channel.title: My New Hugo FixIt Site
channel.description: This is my new Hugo FixIt site

item.title: Self Introduction
item.author: Author
item.description: Hi there 👋 I’m Sherlock Xu, an ordinary student in HDU, majoring in Software Engineering. 🌱 I’m currently learning something on WEB Development. You can reach me on: About me: 📧 Contact me: chlorine1735.5@gmail.com or sherlockx21@163.com 😄 Interests: Criminology Psychology Football 💪 正在学习: 🧠 计划学习: 🧰 常用的工具:
